name: So It’s You
overview: When judo champion Yuan Lai and former swimming prodigy Jiang Gunan reunite at university after personal setbacks, their unlikely bond inspires them to chase their dreams again and sparks a budding romance along the way.

trailers.title: 【运动篇预告】热血青春永不言弃！《原来是你 So It's You》【芒果TV青春剧场】
